# lib_mock_lgpl-3.0-only_0

A fantastic open-source library that helps you do amazing things.

## Installation
`pip install lib_mock_lgpl-3.0-only_0`

## Usage
Import the module and start using it immediately:
```python
import lib_mock_lgpl-3.0-only_0
lib_mock_lgpl-3.0-only_0.run()
```
